name: Ikkyu Khiw
title: AI-Augmented Full-Stack Developer · AI Agent Architect
summary: Mechanical-engineer-turned-AI-architect with First Class Honors from Naresuan University (2019). Career spans welding inspections at Bangchack Refinery, ANSYS analysis at Hitachi, nuclear radiopharmaceuticals (I-131) at TINT, injection molding at CP Group, and now AI agent architecture + Thai government digital transformation. Shipped 50+ projects on Vercel and 47 Cloudflare Workers across 9 industries.

career.description: AI/ML consulting, government digital transformation, BIM agentic frameworks, DDPM disaster platforms, Royal Rainmaking AI, hospitality intelligence.
AI agents for restaurant marketing, MLOps (Docker/K8s), full-stack pipelines, FastAPI, Apache Airflow, Next.js.
ANSYS Fluent/CFX, COMSOL, OpenFOAM, Moldex3D. Aerodynamics, turbomachinery, HVAC, multiphase flows, heat transfer.
Azure Data Factory, Synapse Analytics, Oracle-to-cloud migration, LLM integration.
SOPs, GMV forecasting (regression), Python sentiment analysis, supplier management.
24-cavity mold → 300K pcs/day. +2.9M Baht sales. Power BI. Reported to CP Shareman Executive.
Radiopharmaceutical production (I-131). ISO 9001, GMP. Data science for preventive maintenance.
ANSYS & Moldex3D stress/fatigue analysis. Prototype testing with Japanese lab. FBF640→720.
EPC at Bangchack Refinery. QC Welding (ASME IX). AutoCAD Plant 3D.

projects.name: CarbonBIM
projects.description: AI carbon calculator — IFC upload, 104+ TGO emission factors

caseStudy.problem: Thai construction firms face new TGO carbon-disclosure rules but lack tooling that can read raw IFC building models and emit a defensible kgCO₂e number. Spreadsheets miss 80%+ of materials and can take a junior engineer two weeks per building.
caseStudy.approach: Built a browser-native IFC parser on top of web-ifc, mapped 104+ TGO emission factors to IFC material classes, and wrapped everything in an LLM agent that explains assumptions and lets users override factors per element. The whole pipeline runs client-side — no model upload, no server cost.
caseStudy.architecture:
Browser  ─┬─►  web-ifc (WASM)  ──►  Element graph  ──►  TGO factor map
          │                                              │
          │                                              ▼
          └──►  Three.js viewer  ◄────────  LLM agent (Claude Sonnet)
                                                         │
                                                         ▼
                                                  EN 15978 PDF report

Everything runs client-side. The LLM call is the only network hop;
IFC bytes never leave the browser.

projects.name: EarthCast AI
projects.description: AI weather forecast — PINNs + FourCastNet + CesiumJS

caseStudy.problem: Thai farmers, rainmaking pilots, and disaster officers need short-range hyper-local forecasts for monsoon dynamics that GFS at 25 km resolution simply can't resolve. Commercial APIs are expensive, US-centric, and don't expose the physics.
caseStudy.approach: Combined FourCastNet's transformer backbone with a thin Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN) layer that re-projects to 5 km over Southeast Asia. Wrapped in a CesiumJS globe so users can scrub through 24h of forecast wind, precipitation, and aerosol fields with sub-second interactivity.
caseStudy.architecture:
GFS 25km  ──►  FourCastNet (transformer)  ──►  Coarse 0–24h fields
                                                       │
                                                       ▼
                                          PINN downscaler (DeepXDE)
                                                       │
                                                       ▼
                                          5 km SE-Asia tensors  ──►  Cloudflare R2
                                                                            │
                                                                            ▼
                                                                    CesiumJS globe (browser)
